title: Assistant district attorneys
doc_html:
§603. Assistant district attorneys

           The offices of first, second, and third assistant district attorneys for the Twenty-Seventh Judicial District of Louisiana are hereby created.

           Added by Acts 1952, No. 445, §1. Amended by Acts 1972, No. 421, §1.
doc_text:
§603.  Assistant district attorneys
The offices of first, second, and third assistant district attorneys for the
Twenty-Seventh Judicial District of Louisiana are hereby created.
Added by Acts 1952, No. 445, §1.  Amended by Acts 1972, No. 421,
§1.
